title: PVH Corp. (PVH) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) valuation of PVH Corp., incorporating moderate growth assumptions reflecting its mature brand portfolio.

fcfGrowth.title: Projected FCF Growth
fcfGrowth.rationale: 5.0% projected annual free cash flow growth, slightly outpacing recent sluggish top-line growth due to margin expansion initiatives.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate
discountRate.rationale: 10.0%, reflecting the cyclical risks and discretionary nature of the apparel sector.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale: 2.0%, aligning with long-term global GDP growth expectations for a mature apparel company.
